name: Harvest
description: Time tracking, invoicing, and project management tool for teams and freelancers.

auth_methods.note: Documentation explicitly lists OAuth 2.0 for third-party apps and Personal Access Tokens (used as bearer tokens). The API root also shows Authorization: Bearer <token> header requirement.

credential_access.note: Personal Access Tokens can be created via the user UI (Avatar → Personal Settings → API Credentials) which indicates a user can self-serve obtain credentials for their account. Pricing page does not state API access is restricted to paid plans.

api_surface.note: Docs describe a REST API with many resource endpoints (Time Tracking, Users, Clients, Projects, Tasks, Expenses, Invoices, Reports, etc.) and base URL https://api.harvestapp.com/v2/.

buildability.note: Public REST API documentation exists and Personal Access Tokens can be self-generated, enabling immediate development and testing.
